name: Reduce Lines of Code and Complexity

description: Baseline: 35,782 lines of code in src/
Consolidated 3 formatDuration functions into 1 universal function in workout-summary.ts
Removed duplicate calculateE1RM from workout-summary.ts, imported from calculations.ts
Consolidated getThisWeekRange and getThisMonthRange to use date utilities
Summary: Consolidated duplicate utilities (formatDuration, calculateE1RM, date range functions). Total: 41 LOC reduced.
Consolidated exercise category checks in getTested1RMs to use helper functions from categories.ts
Additional consolidation: getTested1RMs now uses exercise category helpers from categories.ts
